phases.title: Real-world corpus intake foundation
acceptance: a finite 100-to-300 case target is distributed across all required difficult-image categories
every future fixture is bound to immutable source and consent SHA-256 digests without publishing raw private assets
only reviewed ownership, consent or public-domain license classes are accepted
privacy review, bounded dimensions, bounded file size and deterministic corpus splits are mandatory
unknown provenance, missing consent, duplicate identity, private-data leakage or corpus shrinkage fails closed

phases.title: Real pipeline measurement and automatic retry gate
Live beta validation and release evidence
